summary: Iter 18 — Super Admin Console restructure (separate /admin shell). 23/23 backend pytest pass, all frontend admin flows verified (login redirect, sidebar, overview, users table+search, manage modal with 5 tabs, subscription/wallet/discount save with toasts, audit history populated, revenue rollup, audit log page, view-as-user, logout clears session, /admin guarded when logged out).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~5434 lines — admin write-actions block (4750-5005) should be extracted into /app/backend/admin_console.py for maintainability.
PLAN_PRICE_INR is hardcoded inside admin_revenue (line 4952). It is duplicated logic from the real billing module — extract a single source of truth so pricing changes don't drift.

admin_set_subscription overwrites trial_ends_at to None for non-FREE_TRIAL plans but does NOT clear stale trial state on the user document if it lives on the user record. Confirm trial flag is read solely from subscriptions collection.
admin_set_role allows setting role to 'admin' with no audit warning; consider notifying via email or surfacing a confirmation modal on the frontend (currently only audit-logged).

admin_adjust_wallet uses _get_or_create_wallet which has a TOCTOU race (carry-over from iter16) — two concurrent admin adjustments on a brand-new wallet could create duplicates. Add unique index on wallets.user_id.

AdminLayout logout: after navigate('/login'), occasionally the URL stays on /admin briefly until the next render — consider window.location.assign('/login') or invalidate the auth context synchronously to avoid the flash.
Audit log endpoint returns full payload as raw JSON — large payloads (e.g. notes) are not truncated; consider trimming or storing payload size for UI ergonomics.
discounts collection is upserted but there is no GET endpoint for the user to see their own discount; verify whether checkout/billing actually consumes db.discounts.percent at payment time.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 ephemeral non-admin users (TEST_iter18_*) via /api/auth/register for permission tests + executed PRO/3mo subscription, +500/-100 wallet adjustments, 25%/15% discount, suspend/unsuspend on test target. All actions logged in admin_audit_log.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin shell at /admin/* fully working with dark sidebar (data-testid: admin-shell, admin-nav-{overview|users|revenue|audit}, admin-view-as-user, admin-logout). Manage modal data-testids: tab-{subscription|wallet|discount|role|history}, edit-plan-select, edit-duration, save-subscription, edit-wallet-amount, edit-wallet-reason, save-wallet, edit-discount-pct, save-discount. AdminOnly guard correctly redirects non-admin/unauth users. Login redirect to /admin works for role=admin. /api/admin/users/{uid}, /api/admin/users/{uid}/{subscription|wallet/adjust|discount|role|suspend}, /api/admin/revenue, /api/admin/audit-log all respond correctly. Validation: zero amount → 400, short reason → 400, insufficient balance → 400, invalid plan → 400, invalid percent → 400, self-demote/self-suspend → 400, non-admin → 403, unknown uid → 404. Legacy /api/admin/overview and /api/admin/users still work. Audit table column headers use uppercase CSS (zm-section-label) — keyword matches must use case-insensitive when checking inner_text.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iter. All backend endpoints validated and frontend flows pass on first run.
